Grace window FAQ

Grace window summary

Grace window FAQ

Grace window FAQs matter when operators need direct answers about how long softened recovery pacing can remain active after a burst-credit event.

These notes explain how grace thresholds should be measured across recovery dashboards before normal pacing resumes.

They also explain when fallback regions can continue serving traffic without breaking shared throughput stability.

Related limit guides
